advertisements.description: The Genuine Comfort Shoe. SPECIALLY made for tender feet. Soft leather on natural lasts that fit every curve of the foot. We have them in several styles. If you are bothered with your feet Dr. Reed's shoes are what you need.
Exclusive Agents for Dr. A. Reed Cushion Sole Shoes. ATT SHOES STOCKINGS. 805 HOUSTON STREET
On October 15th We Gave Away A Free Sewing Machine. The Free is the Machine needed in every home. Phone for our machine man. On credit at cash prices. Corner West Seventh and Throckmorton Streets

Everything to eat and drink-Cabaret-high-class entertainment to please the most exacting. Call and see and you will appreciate our efforts to give you the best. We aim to please. Special Dinner Every Sunday, 12 to 8 p. m. 1103 MAIN STREET.

We are exclusive agents for WILSON HEATERS for wood and coal, in size to suit any room and in price to suit almost any purse. No stove manufactured gives out more heat for the fuel used than the Wilson Heater, A pretty display of these stoves can be seen in our south window. You'll need a stove soon-make it a Wilson Heater. We carry a full line of other makes for wood, coal and gas.
